channel.title: Industrieën on Flash deals to get monitored

item.title: Simon & Schuster - Shoe Dog: A Memoir by the Creator of Nike
item.description: You’ve got Simon & Schuster - Shoe Dog: A Memoir by the Creator of Nike at the following link: ℹ️: In 1962, fresh out of business school, phil knight borrowed 50 from his father and created a company with a simple mission: import high-quality, athletic shoes from japan. Selling the shoes from the boot of his , knight grossed 8000 in his first year. Today, nikes annual sales top 30 billion.
